name: retrieve_detailed_user_information
description: Retrieves comprehensive information for a valid slack user id, excluding message history and channel memberships.

user.description:
The ID of the user to retrieve information for.
Examples:
  "U012ABCDEF"
  "W021XYZABC"

include_locale.description: Set to `true` to include the user's locale (e.g., `en-US`) in the response. Defaults to `false`.
